_comment: IDENTITY.json — the capability-certificate. The deterministic Yama gate and Kaal-Bhairav boundary read THIS; no SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is authoritative against it (doc 13 §13.5). bound_toolset entries are typed Effect-lattice ids; granted_by_did is governance, never the agent. Keys live in the HSM; key_ref is opaque.

INVARIANT._region_note: hashed; boot-gated; editable only at top-gate C/D + GLR + safety battery + human ratification (§13.6)

VARIABLE._region_note: editable under tiered reversibility; new grant OR taint-clearance widening = gate-loosening ⇒ GLR + Sequencer + human ratification (§13.6.2)

bound_toolset.falsifier: a build step that reaches the network or filesystem outside the declared CI sandbox allowlist
an artifact published without a content-address CID or without a Sigstore/in-toto attestation
an observability change that reduces alert coverage or suppresses audit-relevant telemetry
canary/shadow traffic exceeding the declared blast-radius percentage without a Class-C escalation
a production promotion executed without a recorded Class-C human approval or without an independent Narasimha maker-checker concurrence
a rollback to a target not present in the signed release record as a known-good reversible version
an incident action that performs an irreversible or destructive state change (data migration, destructive cleanup) without a Class-C/D human gate

taint_clearance._note: load-bearing IFC boundary (CaMeL/FIDES). Widening (raise read / lower write) = gate-loosening ⇒ full GLR + Sequencer (§13.6.2). Only tightening is the free Class-A direction.

diversity_profile._note: doc 01 §11 PSO dials — c1=0.5 (independence/exploration), c2=0.7 (convergence/deference to constitutional signal)
